title: Frozen 2 Inspired “Frozen Heart” cards
excerpt: I am excited to be collaborating with Frozen 2 on behalf of Walt Disney Studios to bring you this blog post and thank them for their generous support! Since seeing Frozen 2, Jack has declared it to be his favorite…
body:
I am excited to be collaborating with Frozen 2 on behalf of Walt Disney Studios to bring you this blog post and thank them for their generous support!

Since seeing Frozen 2, Jack has declared it to be his favorite movie. I have been so inspired to create using paper in various ways and thought it would be perfect to do an origami inspired card, which could be used for any occasion. If you’re looking for a fun spin on a Valentine’s Day card or a thank you card for a gift you got recently, I think this might be the perfect project.

Supplies: - bowl (smaller than square origami paper) - origami paper - 2 pieces of 8.5”x11” cardstock - glue - scissors - pencil - foam pop dots - printer

Here are the project sheets we created. Hope you have fun making these!

Disney’s ‘Frozen 2’ is now on Digital and on Blu-ray™ February 25!
